mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO federated_learning ( task_type, algorithm_type, federated_type, task_name, project_id, own_organ_id, own_resource_id, own_features, label_feature, is_label_owner, participant_organ_ids, participant_resource_ids, training_params, model_id, model_path, result_path, remarks, user_id, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{taskType}, #{algorithmType}, #{federatedType}, #{taskName}, #{projectId}, #{ownOrganId}, #{ownResourceId}, #{ownFeatures}, #{labelFeature}, #{isLabelOwner}, #{participantOrganIds}, #{participantResourceIds}, #{trainingParams}, #{modelId}, #{modelPath}, #{resultPath}, #{remarks}, #{userId}, 0, now(), now() )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id

INSERT INTO federated_learning_task ( fl_id, task_id, task_state, current_round, total_rounds, accuracy, loss, metrics, result_rows, result_file_path, execution_log, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{flId}, #{taskId}, #{taskState}, #{currentRound}, #{totalRounds}, #{accuracy}, #{loss}, #{metrics}, #{resultRows}, #{resultFilePath}, #{executionLog}, 0, now(), now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE federated_learning SET model_path = #{modelPath}, result_path = #{resultPath}, update_date = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE federated_learning_task SET task_state = #{taskState}, current_round = #{currentRound}, total_rounds = #{totalRounds}, accuracy = #{accuracy}, loss = #{loss}, metrics = #{metrics}, result_rows = #{resultRows}, result_file_path = #{resultFilePath}, execution_log = #{executionLog}, update_date = now() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
